tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsAgentsChangelogsList
tools.description: Returns the list of Changelogs.

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsAgentsCreate
tools.description: Creates an agent in the specified location. Note: You should always train flows prior to sending them queries. See the [training documentation](https://cloud.google.com/dialogflow/cx/docs/concept/training).

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsAgentsEnvironmentsContinuousTestResultsList
tools.description: Fetches a list of continuous test results for a given environment.

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsAgentsEnvironmentsCreate
tools.description: Creates an Environment in the specified Agent. This method is a [long-running operation](https://cloud.google.com/dialogflow/cx/docs/how/long-running-operation). The returned `Operation` type has the following method-specific fields: - `metadata`: An empty [Struct message](https://developers.google.com/protocol-buffers/docs/reference/google.protobuf#struct) - `response`: Environment

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsAgentsEnvironmentsDeployFlow
tools.description: Deploys a flow to the specified Environment. This method is a [long-running operation](https://cloud.google.com/dialogflow/cx/docs/how/long-running-operation). The returned `Operation` type has the following method-specific fields: - `metadata`: DeployFlowMetadata - `response`: DeployFlowResponse

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsAgentsEnvironmentsDeploymentsList
tools.description: Returns the list of all deployments in the specified Environment.

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsAgentsEnvironmentsExperimentsCreate
tools.description: Creates an Experiment in the specified Environment.

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsAgentsEnvironmentsExperimentsList
tools.description: Returns the list of all experiments in the specified Environment.

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsAgentsEnvironmentsExperimentsStart
tools.description: Starts the specified Experiment. This rpc only changes the state of experiment from PENDING to RUNNING.

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsAgentsEnvironmentsExperimentsStop
tools.description: Stops the specified Experiment. This rpc only changes the state of experiment from RUNNING to DONE.

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsAgentsEnvironmentsList
tools.description: Returns the list of all environments in the specified Agent.

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsAgentsEnvironmentsLookupEnvironmentHistory
tools.description: Looks up the history of the specified Environment.

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsAgentsEnvironmentsRunContinuousTest
tools.description: Kicks off a continuous test under the specified Environment. This method is a [long-running operation](https://cloud.google.com/dialogflow/cx/docs/how/long-running-operation). The returned `Operation` type has the following method-specific fields: - `metadata`: RunContinuousTestMetadata - `response`: RunContinuousTestResponse

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsAgentsFlowsCreate
tools.description: Creates a flow in the specified agent. Note: You should always train a flow prior to sending it queries. See the [training documentation](https://cloud.google.com/dialogflow/cx/docs/concept/training).

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsAgentsFlowsExport
tools.description: Exports the specified flow to a binary file. This method is a [long-running operation](https://cloud.google.com/dialogflow/cx/docs/how/long-running-operation). The returned `Operation` type has the following method-specific fields: - `metadata`: An empty [Struct message](https://developers.google.com/protocol-buffers/docs/reference/google.protobuf#struct) - `response`: ExportFlowResponse Note that resources (e.g. intents, entities, webhooks) that the flow references will also be exported.

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsAgentsFlowsImport
tools.description: Imports the specified flow to the specified agent from a binary file. This method is a [long-running operation](https://cloud.google.com/dialogflow/cx/docs/how/long-running-operation). The returned `Operation` type has the following method-specific fields: - `metadata`: An empty [Struct message](https://developers.google.com/protocol-buffers/docs/reference/google.protobuf#struct) - `response`: ImportFlowResponse Note: You should always train a flow prior to sending it queries. See the [training documentation](https://cloud.google.com/dialogflow/cx/docs/concept/training).

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsAgentsFlowsList
tools.description: Returns the list of all flows in the specified agent.

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsAgentsFlowsPagesCreate
tools.description: Creates a page in the specified flow. Note: You should always train a flow prior to sending it queries. See the [training documentation](https://cloud.google.com/dialogflow/cx/docs/concept/training).

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsAgentsFlowsPagesList
tools.description: Returns the list of all pages in the specified flow.

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsAgentsFlowsTrain
tools.description: Trains the specified flow. Note that only the flow in 'draft' environment is trained. This method is a [long-running operation](https://cloud.google.com/dialogflow/cx/docs/how/long-running-operation). The returned `Operation` type has the following method-specific fields: - `metadata`: An empty [Struct message](https://developers.google.com/protocol-buffers/docs/reference/google.protobuf#struct) - `response`: An [Empty message](https://developers.google.com/protocol-buffers/docs/reference/google.protobuf#empty) Note: You should always train a flow prior to sending it queries. See the [training documentation](https://cloud.google.com/dialogflow/cx/docs/concept/training).

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsAgentsFlowsTransitionRouteGroupsCreate
tools.description: Creates an TransitionRouteGroup in the specified flow. Note: You should always train a flow prior to sending it queries. See the [training documentation](https://cloud.google.com/dialogflow/cx/docs/concept/training).

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsAgentsFlowsTransitionRouteGroupsList
tools.description: Returns the list of all transition route groups in the specified flow.

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsAgentsFlowsValidate
tools.description: Validates the specified flow and creates or updates validation results. Please call this API after the training is completed to get the complete validation results.

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsAgentsFlowsVersionsCompareVersions
tools.description: Compares the specified base version with target version.

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsAgentsFlowsVersionsCreate
tools.description: Creates a Version in the specified Flow. This method is a [long-running operation](https://cloud.google.com/dialogflow/cx/docs/how/long-running-operation). The returned `Operation` type has the following method-specific fields: - `metadata`: CreateVersionOperationMetadata - `response`: Version

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsAgentsFlowsVersionsList
tools.description: Returns the list of all versions in the specified Flow.

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsAgentsFlowsVersionsLoad
tools.description: Loads resources in the specified version to the draft flow. This method is a [long-running operation](https://cloud.google.com/dialogflow/cx/docs/how/long-running-operation). The returned `Operation` type has the following method-specific fields: - `metadata`: An empty [Struct message](https://developers.google.com/protocol-buffers/docs/reference/google.protobuf#struct) - `response`: An [Empty message](https://developers.google.com/protocol-buffers/docs/reference/google.protobuf#empty)

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsAgentsIntentsCreate
tools.description: Creates an intent in the specified agent. Note: You should always train a flow prior to sending it queries. See the [training documentation](https://cloud.google.com/dialogflow/cx/docs/concept/training).

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsAgentsIntentsList
tools.description: Returns the list of all intents in the specified agent.

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsAgentsList
tools.description: Returns the list of all agents in the specified location.

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsAgentsRestore
tools.description: Restores the specified agent from a binary file. Replaces the current agent with a new one. Note that all existing resources in agent (e.g. intents, entity types, flows) will be removed. This method is a [long-running operation](https://cloud.google.com/dialogflow/cx/docs/how/long-running-operation). The returned `Operation` type has the following method-specific fields: - `metadata`: An empty [Struct message](https://developers.google.com/protocol-buffers/docs/reference/google.protobuf#struct) - `response`: An [Empty message](https://developers.google.com/protocol-buffers/docs/reference/google.protobuf#empty) Note: You should always train flows prior to sending them queries. See the [training documentation](https://cloud.google.com/dialogflow/cx/docs/concept/training).

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsAgentsSessionsDetectIntent
tools.description: Processes a natural language query and returns structured, actionable data as a result. This method is not idempotent, because it may cause session entity types to be updated, which in turn might affect results of future queries. Note: Always use agent versions for production traffic. See [Versions and environments](https://cloud.google.com/dialogflow/cx/docs/concept/version).

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsAgentsSessionsEntityTypesCreate
tools.description: Creates a session entity type.

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsAgentsSessionsEntityTypesList
tools.description: Returns the list of all session entity types in the specified session.

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsAgentsSessionsFulfillIntent
tools.description: Fulfills a matched intent returned by MatchIntent. Must be called after MatchIntent, with input from MatchIntentResponse. Otherwise, the behavior is undefined.

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsAgentsSessionsMatchIntent
tools.description: Returns preliminary intent match results, doesn't change the session status.

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsAgentsTestCasesBatchDelete
tools.description: Batch deletes test cases.

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsAgentsTestCasesBatchRun
tools.description: Kicks off a batch run of test cases. This method is a [long-running operation](https://cloud.google.com/dialogflow/cx/docs/how/long-running-operation). The returned `Operation` type has the following method-specific fields: - `metadata`: BatchRunTestCasesMetadata - `response`: BatchRunTestCasesResponse

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsAgentsTestCasesCalculateCoverage
tools.description: Calculates the test coverage for an agent.

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsAgentsTestCasesCreate
tools.description: Creates a test case for the given agent.

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsAgentsTestCasesExport
tools.description: Exports the test cases under the agent to a Cloud Storage bucket or a local file. Filter can be applied to export a subset of test cases. This method is a [long-running operation](https://cloud.google.com/dialogflow/cx/docs/how/long-running-operation). The returned `Operation` type has the following method-specific fields: - `metadata`: ExportTestCasesMetadata - `response`: ExportTestCasesResponse

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsAgentsTestCasesImport
tools.description: Imports the test cases from a Cloud Storage bucket or a local file. It always creates new test cases and won't overwrite any existing ones. The provided ID in the imported test case is neglected. This method is a [long-running operation](https://cloud.google.com/dialogflow/cx/docs/how/long-running-operation). The returned `Operation` type has the following method-specific fields: - `metadata`: ImportTestCasesMetadata - `response`: ImportTestCasesResponse

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsAgentsTestCasesList
tools.description: Fetches a list of test cases for a given agent.

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsAgentsTestCasesResultsList
tools.description: Fetches a list of results for a given test case.

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsAgentsTestCasesRun
tools.description: Kicks off a test case run. This method is a [long-running operation](https://cloud.google.com/dialogflow/cx/docs/how/long-running-operation). The returned `Operation` type has the following method-specific fields: - `metadata`: RunTestCaseMetadata - `response`: RunTestCaseResponse

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsAgentsWebhooksCreate
tools.description: Creates a webhook in the specified agent.

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsAgentsWebhooksList
tools.description: Returns the list of all webhooks in the specified agent.

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsList
tools.description: Lists information about the supported locations for this service.

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsSecuritySettingsCreate
tools.description: Create security settings in the specified location.

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsSecuritySettingsDelete
tools.description: Deletes the specified SecuritySettings.

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsSecuritySettingsList
tools.description: Returns the list of all security settings in the specified location.

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsLocationsSecuritySettingsPatch
tools.description: Updates the specified SecuritySettings.

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsOperationsCancel
tools.description: Starts asynchronous cancellation on a long-running operation. The server makes a best effort to cancel the operation, but success is not guaranteed. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `google.rpc.Code.UNIMPLEMENTED`. Clients can use Operations.GetOperation or other methods to check whether the cancellation succeeded or whether the operation completed despite cancellation. On successful cancellation, the operation is not deleted; instead, it becomes an operation with an Operation.error value with a google.rpc.Status.code of 1, corresponding to `Code.CANCELLED`.

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsOperationsGet
tools.description: Gets the latest state of a long-running operation. Clients can use this method to poll the operation result at intervals as recommended by the API service.

tools.name: projects.dialogflowProjectsOperationsList
tools.description: Lists operations that match the specified filter in the request. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `UNIMPLEMENTED`.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
